case_title: LAWRENCE M SEIDLER VS. AIRBNB, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $434.00 FILED BY SEIDLER, LAWRENCE M AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEIDLER, LAWRENCE M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC $309.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $354.00, DEFENDANT AGREES COST OF FISH SHOULD BE COMPENSATED ($184.00). THE COURT ADDS AN ADDITIONAL CLEANING COSTS OF $125.00 FOR EXCESSIVE CLEAINING DUE TO GUEST PARTY AT THE PLAINTIFF'S HOST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEIDLER, LAWRENCE M
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE M. SEIDLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FERNANDA CADAMBI (LEGAL INVESTIGATION ASSOC).. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-14-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DUE TO UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR JAN-14-2022 TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM REQUEST TO THE COURT (SUBMISSION MUST BE RECEIVED AT THE COURTHOUSE TEN DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE).
